long_chain: Change the lighting of the scene from night to a bright, overcast winter morning, fully illuminating the basketball court and the surrounding buildings.
Cover the concrete basketball court surface with a thick layer of fresh, white snow, obscuring the court lines but keeping the central white structure prominent.
Transform the dark background apartment buildings into a row of cozy, snow-covered alpine chalets with warm light glowing from the windows.
Reshape the white foam mattress and pillow in the center into a sculpture made of large, smooth blocks of translucent blue ice.
Replace the small blue toy car next to the ice structure with a miniature red snowmobile.
Add a gentle, continuous snowfall with visible white flakes drifting down across the entire scene.
Change the color of the basketball hoop pole and backboard support from green to a rustic, dark brown wood texture.
Introduce a warm, golden-hour sunset light source from the right side, casting long, dramatic shadows from the basketball hoop and the ice blocks.
Add a layer of low-hanging, misty fog swirling around the base of the ice blocks and the basketball hoop.
Apply a cinematic color grade with high contrast, emphasizing cool blue shadows and warm orange highlights on the snow and buildings.
